description_long: This is a futuristic, tactical shotgun with a sleek, angular design and a predominantly black finish accented by metallic and gold details. The body features a prominent top rail, likely for mounting optics, and a digital or illuminated display near the rear. The barrel is elongated and appears reinforced, with a muzzle that suggests advanced engineering, possibly for recoil reduction or specialized ammunition. The grip is ergonomic, with a trigger guard that is squared and robust, and the stock is compact, integrated into the main body for a streamlined profile. Red and yellow highlights are visible on the rear and along the top, adding to its high-tech appearance. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, designed for durability and modern urban combat scenarios.
description: A sleek, futuristic black shotgun with gold and metallic accents, featuring a long barrel, top rail, and compact integrated stock. Its angular, high-tech design is accented by red and yellow highlights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, with visible top rail, digital display, and red accent at the rear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the top rail and sighting system.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same angular body, gold accents, and the compact stock, with the muzzle and barrel details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock, red accent, and the arrangement of controls and display elements on the top.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, elongated with reinforced muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, robust, medium-sized with reinforced edges
